## 🛠 Type of Change
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)

- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## 🧪 Checklist
- [ ] App runs locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] Feature tested on both Desktop and Mobile layouts
- [ ] Real-time synchronization (lyrics/player) verified
- [ ] Accessibility (ARIA, keyboard shortcuts) considered
- [ ] No secrets (API keys, session tokens) or build files included
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated
